seed_problem: Frontier-CS cant_be_late offline / ALE-Bench spot-vs-on-demand replay
mutation: input+goal: replay a fixed ski-lift demand/availability trace as a static full-horizon lift-dispatch cost-minimization (choose on-demand/spot/pause per slot); intermittent cheap spot option + holding + stranding penalties make it a capacitated lot-sizing-style optimization with no easy optimum
title: Alpine Lift Dispatch Replay
strategies: trivial: run the on-demand gondola every slot (the scoring baseline)
greedy: clear each slot immediately with the cheapest single lift (spot when available, else on-demand)

strong: forward lookahead that pauses to batch demand across no-spot gaps and defers to cheap spot windows, running on-demand only when holding cost exceeds a run or the queue must be bounded/cleared by deadline
DP / local search over the queue trajectory (Wagner-Whitin-style lot sizing with capacity and intermittent options)
